chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-340 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Fresh Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 1695/25 3.For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** On 10.04.2025, the following order was passed: “None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Counsel for the petitioner is put on notice to satisfy the Court as to the maintainability on the point of laches involved in this Petition. Matter is adjourned to be fixed after four weeks”. Today, neither petitioner is present nor his counsel is in attendance; no intimation is received so far, which reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding with this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application(s), if any. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
